title: allosorus angulosus
intro: Allosorus angulosus, also known as the Rough Horsetail or Barren Scouring Rush, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the fern family and is characterized by its unique, rough, and scaly appearance. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in the treatment of kidney and urinary issues due to its diuretic properties. The health benefits of Allosorus angulosus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Allosorus angulosus is often prepared in herbal teas or infusions for its medicinal benefits, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as kidney stones and urinary tract infections.
